description: Court minute, in the hand of Natan b. Shemuel he-Ḥaver. Location: Fustat. Legal document concerning the Sicilian Abū Yaʿaqov Yosef b. Moshe al-Kohen who has a first wife in Damascus and is not allowed to marry a second wife in Cairo before depositing what is due to the first wife with the court. Dated: Ṭevet 1451 of the Seleucid Era (= 1140 CE). Signed by Yeshuʿa b. Yoshiyya, descendant of Shemaʿya Gaʾon and Natan b. Shemuel he-Ḥaver. (Information from CUDL.) There is a translation and commentary in Goitein's attached notes.
